channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Joe Gruters tells Newsmax far-left Democrats will aid GOP in midterm wins
item.description: RNC Chair Joe Gruters told Newsmax on Tuesday he believes the GOP can defy historical trends and keep its House majority.

item.title: Introducing a radical new concept: sports reporting that actually covers sports
Blue state shield laws allowed 330K abortion pills into ban states, pro-life group says
item.description: A pro-life group reported that nearly 330,000 abortion pills were shipped to states with restrictions since 2023 under blue state shield laws.

item.title: Trump launches Great American State Fair as 250th anniversary events fill National Mall
item.description: President Trump kicked off the Great American State Fair on the National Mall, celebrating America's 250th birthday with all 50 states and territories.
